creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 180785
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates cad/openvsp to latest release (3.11.0). From the project's site:

Features

    Blended Wings
    Conformal Components
    XPatch export
    Improved DXF 2D export (outlines)
    SVG 2D export
    SubSurface areas in CompGeom
    CompGeom faster
    IGES/STEP surface splitting along U/W-Const SubSurface lines
    Mesh STL files can write surfaces and/or slices

Bug Fixes

    WaveDrag set choice glitch – thanks Alex Ziebart & Mike Raber
    Set editor conflict
    CFDMesh with Shown set
    Update CFDMesh when meshing fails
    Prop curve indexing problem when enforcing order (possible crash)
    WaveDrag reference area flag Parm in wrong group
    Set VSPAERO analysis method from API
    CFDMesh threading console update
    Highlight Selected Set in Set Editor


A new patch needs to be added since 3.11.0 was released with a bug that was fixed later[1].

Q/A:
 - portlint -AC: OK
 - poudriere builds for {10.3,11.0}{i386,amd64}

*I would like to step up if there are any committers willing to mentor me*

[1] https://github.com/OpenVSP/OpenVSP/commit/697b3fa676bfb89ba929f8ab06f13b9d91ea9b31
